description: Create a vector. Vectors are an internal list of user-defined objects that have the position v and a vector value, assigned via either the value keyword or the dip , dip-direction and magnitude keyword combination, associated with them. Vectors may also have groups and extra variables assigned to them upon creation.

keywords.name: dip
keywords.description: Specify the dip of the vector in degrees. Not to be used with the value keyword.

keywords.name: dip-direction
keywords.description: Specify the dip direction of the vector in degrees. Not to be used with the value keyword.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Optionally assign the extra variable a to index i .

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Optionally assign the group name s to slot s2 . By default, s2 = Default . Use of the group logic is described in Group .

keywords.name: magnitude
keywords.description: Specify the magnitude of the vector. Not to be used with the value keyword.

keywords.name: value
keywords.description: Assign v to be the value associated with the vector. One can optionally specify the magnitude separately with the magnitude keyword immediately following, in which case v is used only to provide the direction.

keywords.name: azimuth
keywords.description: Specify the azimuth of the vector in degrees. Not to be used with the value , dip , or dip-direction keywords.

keywords.name: dip
keywords.description: Specify the dip of the vector in degrees. Not to be used with the value , azimuth , or plunge keywords.

keywords.name: dip-direction
keywords.description: Specify the dip direction of the vector in degrees. Not to be used with the value , azimuth , or plunge keywords.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: Optionally assign the extra variable a to index i .

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Optionally assign the group name s to slot s2 . By default, s2 = Default . Use of the group logic is described in Groups .

keywords.name: magnitude
keywords.description: Specify the magnitude of the vector. Not to be used with the value keyword.

keywords.name: plunge
keywords.description: Specify the plunge of the vector. Not to be used with the value , dip , or dip-direction keywords.

keywords.name: value
keywords.description: Assign v to be the value associated with the vector. One can optionally specify the magnitude separately with the magnitude keyword immediately following, in which case v is used only to provide the direction.
